archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) blended with 3 (Pastel & Soft) - Neon-lite Glassmorphism

headings.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep H1 to text-5xl/6xl max.

body.rules: Left-aligned for paragraphs and data grids.

mono.usage: Room IDs, Game scores, Timers, 'Ad, Soyad...' categories.

surface.glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)]
surface.input: bg-black/40 border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-indigo-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-400

layout_and_spacing.grids: Bento Grid protocol Mode B ('Control Room') for Game Room & Admin Dashboard. Mode A ('Tetris') for Landing/Lobby.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for pills and buttons.
layout_and_spacing.rules: Inner padding must prevent text collision (p-6 or p-8 for glass panels). Max-h-[80vh] for any images on mobile.

motion.page_transition: Framer motion staggered fade-in, y: 20 to 0.
motion.microinteractions: Score additions (+10, +5) float up and fade out. Timer pulses red when <10s.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-400 text-white rounded-full font-bold tracking-wide transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.4)]
buttons.glass: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full transition-all

cards.glass_card: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8

inputs.text: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all

shadcn_customizations.dialog: Dark glassmorphic overlay (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm), modal body bg-[#0B0E14] border-white/10
shadcn_customizations.tabs: bg-black/40 border-white/10, active tab bg-white/10 text-indigo-300
shadcn_customizations.table: bg-transparent, row border-b border-white/5, hover bg-white/5

images.description: Abstract dark blue glass liquid wave for landing page background, positioned with absolute inset-0 -z-10 object-cover opacity-60 mix-blend-screen
Neon letter A in a frosted cube, use in hero or lobby as decorative element
Friends playing games on phone, use in 'How to Play' or About section

views_and_features.landing: Hero section with absolute background image, massive Cabinet Grotesk H1 with tracking-tighter, neon-glowing CTA button, Google Sign-In minimal button. Subtle marquee of categories 'Ad, Soyad, Şəhər, Ölkə, Bitki...'.
views_and_features.lobby: Glassmorphism bento grid. Left side: User profile summary. Right side: Two big action blocks (Create Private Room / Join Public). Room code uses JetBrains Mono tracking-widest.
views_and_features.game_room: Intense but clean interface. Timer top center (JetBrains Mono). Dynamic grid for inputs (mobile-optimized stack). Real-time synchronized state. Submitting a word locks the input field with a checkmark. Voting phase swaps input grid to a Tinder-style swipe/approve list of submitted words.
views_and_features.leaderboard: Shadcn Tabs (Daily/Weekly/All-time). Table format with frosted glass rows. Top 3 rows have pastel glows (Gold, Silver, Bronze equivalents in pastel tones).
views_and_features.admin_dashboard: Strict Mode B Control Room grid. Sidebar nav. Dense data tables for moderation. bg-[#0B0E14] without heavy glassmorphism for better performance and readability.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid='login-button'`, `data-testid='room-code-input'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure tailwind is configured correctly for colors. Install fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (headings), Outfit (body), JetBrains Mono (mono). Use standard HTML/Tailwind for Landing/Lobby to allow asymmetrical bento grids. Use customized Shadcn for the Game Room inputs, Admin Dashboard tables, and Modals. Incorporate the generated background images using Next.js/React standard img/div tags with appropriate classNames. Ensure the app uses responsive layouts, prioritizing mobile-first rendering for the Game Room grid.
